startPoint.en: Speak to Sister Catherina outside the Abbey of St. Elspeth Citharede, east of Al Kharid.
startPoint.es: Habla con Sister Catherina fuera del Abbey of St. Elspeth Citharede, al este de Al Kharid.

recommended.name: Al Kharid
recommended.display: A form of quick transportation to Al Kharid, such as a ring of duelling, amulet of glory, Al Kharid lodestone or broomstick

children.name: Musician
children.display: The ability to recharge 33 Prayer points per tick while listening to a Musician (when wearing all 4 Citharede robe-pieces).

rewards.name: Valerio's Song
rewards.display: Valerio's Song (upon entering the Abbey (quest not required))

rewards.name: Traveller's Tale
rewards.display: Traveller's Tale (upon exiting the Abbey gate during Sister Elena's murder investigation)

rewards.name: Troubadour Dance (music track)
rewards.display: Troubadour Dance (upon exiting the Abbey gate when tasked to escort Sister Catherina back)

rewards.name: Citharede Requiem
rewards.display: Citharede Requiem (during the first cutscene of funeral ceremony)

postQuest.name: Illuminated god books
postQuest.display: Ability to make Illuminated god books (with a requirement of level 60 and 60 , and completion of the quest Horror from the Deep)

children.display: The first time each Illuminated god book is made, you will receive 10,000 experience in both Prayer and Crafting, per type of (completed) god book. Making a total experience reward possible of 60,000 in both Prayer and Crafting.

postQuest.display: The ability to obtain Saint Elspeth's Holy Cithara from the Reliquary beneath the Abbey and gain an additional 50,000 experience. Certain other items are needed to achieve this and are listed here.

text.en: Talk to Sister Catherina east of Al Kharid and the Desert strykewyrms.
text.es: Habla con Sister Catherina al este de Al Kharid y los Desert strykewyrms.

chatOptions: 1 Yes! I've come to answer your prayers!

text.en: Talk to Abbess Benita in the abbey, in the centre room north of the fountain.
text.es: Habla con Abbess Benita en la abadía, en la sala central al norte de la fuente.

chatOptions: 2 What can I do to help?

text.en: The cells are in the southeast corner. Enter the westernmost one (Anna's cell).
text.es: Las celdas están en la esquina sureste. Entra en la más occidental (la celda de Anna).

text.en: Inspect the bed and window.
text.es: Inspecciona la cama y la ventana.

text.en: Go back northwest to the room west of Abbess Benita's office and inspect the beds in there for another cloth fragment.
text.es: Vuelve al noroeste, a la sala al oeste de la oficina de Abbess Benita, e inspecciona las camas allí para encontrar otro fragmento de tela.

text.en: Run directly south and inspect the body (the body is covered up in the bed in the southwesternmost room).
text.es: Corre directamente hacia el sur e inspecciona el cuerpo (el cuerpo está cubierto en la cama de la sala más al suroeste).

text.en: Question 5 people around the abbey.
text.es: Interroga a 5 personas por la abadía.

text.en: Valerio - Musician outside the abbey (3 clues).
text.es: Valerio - Músico fuera de la abadía (3 pistas).

chatOptions: 1 You were singing about Sister Anna, weren't you?
2 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?

text.en: Sister Elena, north of the cabbages, in the kitchen (3 clues).
text.es: Sister Elena, al norte de las coles, en la cocina (3 pistas).

chatOptions: 2 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?
2 What did you think of Sister Anna?

text.en: Sister Cecilia, in the east-central room, the chapel (3 clues).
text.es: Sister Cecilia, en la sala centro-este, la capilla (3 pistas).

chatOptions: 2 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?

text.en: Sister Catherina, in the chapel (2 clues).
text.es: Sister Catherina, en la capilla (2 pistas).

chatOptions: 1 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?
1 What did you think of Sister Anna?

text.en: Feet (known as Sister Debora), on the 3rd floor of the clock tower on the northeast side, sticking out under the clock mechanism. Talk to her , then, operate the clock mechanism to show 12 o'clock. Afterwards, talk to her again (2 clues).
text.es: Feet (conocida como Sister Debora), en la 3ª planta de la torre del reloj, en el lado noreste, asomando bajo el mecanismo del reloj. Habla con ella, luego acciona el mecanismo del reloj para que marque las 12 en punto. Después, vuelve a hablar con ella (2 pistas).

chatOptions: 2 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?
1 Where were you between Vespers and Compline yesterday?
2 Tell me about the troubadour outside.
2 What did you think of Sister Anna?

text.en: Return to Abbess Benita, select any suspect.
text.es: Vuelve con Abbess Benita, elige cualquier sospechosa.

text.en: Climb down the stairs to the cellar in the room northeast of the chapel.
text.es: Baja las escaleras hacia el sótano en la sala al noreste de la capilla.

text.en: Investigate the bloodstains (1 clue) and body (5 clues).
text.es: Investiga las manchas de sangre (1 pista) y el cuerpo (5 pistas).

text.en: Search the robe cabinet south of Sister Elena's body. (1 clue)
text.es: Registra el armario de sotanas al sur del cuerpo de Sister Elena. (1 pista)

text.en: Return to Abbess Benita for a cell key.
text.es: Vuelve con Abbess Benita para conseguir una llave de celda.

chatOptions: 2 I need the key to Sister Elena's cell.

text.en: Search the sack (singular, not the sacks) in the kitchen adjacent, east of Abbess Benita.
text.es: Registra el saco (singular, no los sacos) en la cocina adyacente, al este de Abbess Benita.

text.en: In the southeast corner of the building, enter the second cell from the east (Elena's cell) and inspect the bed.
text.es: En la esquina sureste del edificio, entra en la segunda celda desde el este (la celda de Elena) e inspecciona la cama.

text.en: Read the letters, talk to Valerio the musician about Sister Elena's death (1 clue).
text.es: Lee las cartas, habla con Valerio el músico sobre la muerte de Sister Elena (1 pista).

chatOptions: 1 Were you having an affair with Sister Elena?

text.en: Talk to Sister Cecilia in the chapel for a clue.
text.es: Habla con Sister Cecilia en la capilla para obtener una pista.

chatOptions: 2 Can you tell me exactly what happened?

text.en: Return to Abbess Benita and blame anyone/nobody.
text.es: Vuelve con Abbess Benita y acusa a alguien/a nadie.

text.en: Talk to Sister Catherina, who is now dancing outside near Valerio.
text.es: Habla con Sister Catherina, que ahora está bailando afuera cerca de Valerio.

chatOptions: 1 Abbess Benita asked me to bring you back to the abbey.
3 No. You should get back into the abbey.

text.en: Talk to Sister Catherina again. A cutscene begins.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Sister Catherina. Comienza una escena cinemática.

chatOptions: 1 Abbess Benita asked me to bring you back to the abbey.

text.en: Climb the nearby ladder (immediately south of the closed gate), operate the winch, then climb back down.
text.es: Sube por la escalera cercana (inmediatamente al sur de la puerta cerrada), acciona el torno, luego vuelve a bajar.

text.en: You do not need to do this step if you skip the cutscene.
text.es: No necesitas hacer este paso si te saltas la escena cinemática.

text.en: Talk to Valerio near the dead body.
text.es: Habla con Valerio cerca del cuerpo sin vida.

text.en: Talk to Abbess Benita.
text.es: Habla con Abbess Benita.

chatOptions: 4 I don't know who did it.
2 They were all associated with Valerio.

text.en: Pick a cabbage and climb down the stairs to the cellar in the room northeast of the chapel.
text.es: Coge una col y baja las escaleras hacia el sótano en la sala al noreste de la capilla.

text.en: Click move on the candelabrum near the eastern wall in the centre of the room north of the Reliquary, then use a cabbage on it (but don't eat it).
text.es: Haz clic en mover sobre el candelabro cerca de la pared este en el centro de la sala al norte del Reliquary, luego usa una col en él (pero no te la comas).

text.en: Search the robe cabinet, then use the robes on the cabbage-on-candelabrum.
text.es: Registra el armario de sotanas, luego usa las sotanas sobre la col-en-el-candelabro.

text.en: Hide-in the cabinet . You may skip the cutscene.
text.es: Escóndete en el armario. Puedes saltarte la escena cinemática.

chatOptions: 1 Hide in the robe cabinet and wait.

text.en: Knock out the killer, then chase after them around the abbey.
text.es: Deja inconsciente al asesino, luego persíguelo por toda la abadía.

text.en: Talk to the killer at the top of the tower.
text.es: Habla con el asesino en lo alto de la torre.

text.en: Climb down the stairs. You will get sent all the way down.
text.es: Baja las escaleras. Te enviarán hasta abajo del todo.

text.en: Climb up the stairs twice and operate the clock mechanism so that the minute hand points to 12.
text.es: Sube las escaleras dos veces y opera el mecanismo del reloj para que el minutero apunte al 12.

text.en: Climb up the stairs and talk to the killer about the bell.
text.es: Sube las escaleras y habla con el asesino sobre la campana.

chatOptions: 4 Listen - is that the bell ringing?

text.en: Talk to Sister Debora, she'll leave.
text.es: Habla con Sister Debora, ella se marchará.

chatOptions: 3 What should we do with Sister Anna?

text.en: Talk to Sister Anna (the killer) . You may skip the cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Sister Anna (la asesina). Puedes saltarte la escena cinemática.

text.en: Talk to Abbess Benita.
text.es: Habla con Abbess Benita.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
